🏋️

Start Your Own Group

Create a workout group for your gym, run club, or friends. Get your own leaderboard and compete together.

How Groups Work

1

Join a Group

Click join on any group to get added to the Telegram or iMessage chat.

2

Log Workouts

Text your workouts to the group. Our bot tracks everything automatically.

3

Compete

See how you rank against others. Climb the leaderboard and win prizes.
